title: Sustainable Aviation Fuel Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q3 2025
content:
Global SAF Production Projected to reach 129 Million Gallons in Q2 2025 as Industry Momentum Strengthens

Global Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) production is projected to reach 129 million gallons in Q2, reflecting a 65% increase from 2024Q2 levels. This increase is driven by sustained growth in SAF volumes in the California market and recent capacity additions in Europe, including the commissioning of Europeâ€™s largest e-fuel plant in Frankfurt in June. Used Cooking Oil continues to dominate the SAF feedstock mix in Q2 2025, contributing 116 thousand MT. New Market activity in APAC (notably India, where IOCLâ€™s Panipat refinery received ISCC-CORSIA certification in August 2025 for producing SAF from used cooking oil) continues to reinforce long-term growth in the SAF market.
author: Sanyam Malik
